prevalence.population: Women of reproductive age in India

burden.dalyPerCapita: low; linked to adverse pregnancy outcomes and STI susceptibility

vulnerablePopulations: women with limited access to gynecologic care
epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Amsel criteria or Nugent score when available; pH >4.5 typical

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate; recurrence common and follow-up limited

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Mostly clinical diagnosis in many settings; limited microscopy
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Metronidazole/clindamycin regimens; counseling and recurrence management; pregnancy-specific care when indicated
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: High recurrence, overlap with STIs, and limited diagnostic capacity in rural areas
